primary_tasks_at_risk: Bookkeeping / tax prep / standard reporting / variance analysis
primary_protected_tasks: Complex tax strategy / client advisory / regulated sign-off / audit judgment
key_defense: Get CPA + specialize in advisory and strategy not just compliance
notes: Big Four already reducing junior headcount

primary_tasks_at_risk: Contract review / legal research / document drafting / due diligence
primary_protected_tasks: Court appearances / client relationships / novel legal judgment
key_defense: Shift toward specialized litigation support or become supervised AI operator
notes: Harvey AI and Casetext are transforming this role now

primary_tasks_at_risk: All primary tasks
primary_protected_tasks: None significant
key_defense: Exit this role — upskill into data analysis or adjacent technical roles
notes: Most directly and immediately threatened by current AI

primary_tasks_at_risk: Scheduling / email drafting / document management / routine coordination
primary_protected_tasks: Complex stakeholder management / organizational judgment / trusted advisor role
key_defense: Move toward chief-of-staff or operations specialist role with broader scope
notes: Executive assistants with deep organizational knowledge are more resilient

primary_tasks_at_risk: Data gathering / standard report generation / model building from templates
primary_protected_tasks: Investment thesis development / client relationships / judgment calls under uncertainty
key_defense: Specialize in qualitative judgment and client-facing advisory
notes: Quant roles more threatened than qualitative strategic analysis

primary_tasks_at_risk: Routine reporting / data journalism / press release coverage
primary_protected_tasks: Investigative work / source relationships / editorial judgment / accountability reporting
key_defense: Build source networks and investigative capability — AI cannot replace human sources
notes: Sports scores and earnings reports already largely automated

primary_tasks_at_risk: Content delivery / lesson planning / standard grading / administrative tasks
primary_protected_tasks: Mentorship / social-emotional support / classroom management / student relationships
key_defense: Lean into relationship and social-emotional dimensions of teaching
notes: Legal safeguarding requirements protect classroom teacher roles

primary_tasks_at_risk: Documentation / routine monitoring / medication management logistics
primary_protected_tasks: Direct patient care / clinical judgment / emotional support / complex decision-making
key_defense: Documentation automation frees nurses for higher-value patient contact
notes: Nursing shortage means risk is career change not unemployment

primary_tasks_at_risk: Boilerplate coding / bug fixing / unit test writing / documentation
primary_protected_tasks: None significant at this level
key_defense: Accelerate to mid/senior level fast — focus on system design not implementation
notes: Junior headcount already contracting at many tech companies

primary_tasks_at_risk: Routine implementation / code review of simple PRs
primary_protected_tasks: Architecture / system design / cross-functional leadership / complex debugging
key_defense: Double down on design and communication skills
notes: Senior engineers using AI are dramatically more productive — a competitive advantage

primary_tasks_at_risk: Standard calculations / routine drawing production / basic compliance checking
primary_protected_tasks: Novel structural problems / site judgment / licensed sign-off / client advisory
key_defense: Maintain PE license / develop specialty in complex or novel structure types
notes: PE stamp and liability protection is a strong institutional moat

primary_tasks_at_risk: Literature review / data analysis / standard statistical modeling / grant writing
primary_protected_tasks: Hypothesis generation / experimental design / novel scientific judgment / peer relationships
key_defense: Develop deep domain expertise + learn to use AI as a research multiplier
notes: AI excels at processing known information — discovery of new knowledge is still human

primary_tasks_at_risk: Basic estimating / code lookup / scheduling
primary_protected_tasks: All physical installation / troubleshooting / licensed sign-off / site adaptation
key_defense: Get Master Electrician license / add solar and EV charging specialization
notes: Growing demand from electrification more than offsets any AI efficiency

primary_tasks_at_risk: Estimating / scheduling / basic customer communication
primary_protected_tasks: All physical installation / diagnosis / emergency response / site adaptation
key_defense: License + specialization in commercial or industrial
notes: Physical work in variable environments is genuinely hard to robotize

primary_tasks_at_risk: Highly repetitive factory welding on standardized parts
primary_protected_tasks: Complex structural welding / pipe welding / inspection / custom fabrication
key_defense: Pursue certified welding inspector (CWI) or pressure vessel certification
notes: Automotive factory welding is already largely robotic — skilled pipe and structural welding is not

primary_tasks_at_risk: Standardized repetitive tasks / materials handling
primary_protected_tasks: Complex physical problem-solving / variable site conditions / coordination
key_defense: Develop specialty skills / pursue supervisory certifications
notes: Construction robotics advancing but still far from human adaptability in real sites

primary_tasks_at_risk: Simple diagnostics / oil changes / standard maintenance
primary_protected_tasks: Complex multi-system diagnosis / novel failures / EV high voltage systems
key_defense: EV certification is essential — the technology is changing the trade
notes: AI diagnostic tools are powerful assistants not replacements — still need human hands

primary_tasks_at_risk: Routine standardized procedures (some surgical robotics assist)
primary_protected_tasks: Complex judgment / novel intraoperative decisions / patient relationships / accountability
key_defense: Maintain surgical skill breadth / develop expertise in robotic-assisted surgery
notes: Da Vinci and similar robots assist surgeons — they are not autonomous

primary_tasks_at_risk: Session notes / appointment scheduling / standard psychoeducation
primary_protected_tasks: Therapeutic relationship / clinical judgment / crisis intervention / complex case management
key_defense: Relationship and clinical judgment are structurally protected
notes: AI therapy apps exist but do not replace licensed human therapists for serious conditions

primary_tasks_at_risk: Research / document review / standard drafting
primary_protected_tasks: Strategy / court presence / client relationships / novel legal argument / judgment
key_defense: Relationships and judgment are the value — AI makes you more efficient at everything else
notes: Junior lawyer roles are more threatened than senior roles
